title: Pillowy Light Kenyan Lamb Biryani
description: A halal-friendly Kenyan dish featuring tender lamb and fluffy basmati rice, infused with a hint of grassy flavor and a touch of blue food coloring, all built upon a rich mother sauce base.
instructions: Heat the ghee in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the lamb pieces and cook until they are browned on all sides.
Add the mother sauce, blue food coloring, and grassy herbs, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook until the lamb is tender.
Add the basmati rice to the saucepan and stir to combine with the lamb and sauce mixture.
Reduce the heat to low, cover the saucepan, and cook until the rice is fluffy and the liquid has been absorbed.
